name: ltth-desktop2-snapshot
description: PupCid's Little TikTool Helper snapshot - backend app plus Windows launcher sources

scripts.build:launcher:win: cd build-src && go build -o ../launcher.exe -ldflags "-H windowsgui -s -w" launcher-gui.go sysproc_windows.go
scripts.build:bootstrapper:win: cd build-src && go build -o ../ltth-bootstrapper.exe -ldflags "-H windowsgui -s -w" bootstrapper.go

notes.snapshot: This workspace is not a Git checkout and currently does not include the Electron main-process folder. Use app/package.json for Node dependencies.
notes.install: Run npm install in app/ before starting the backend.
